logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-880] The II Violation in module 'fft_fast_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_23_4' (loop 'VITIS_LOOP_23_4'): Unable to enforce a carried dependence constraint (II = 17, distance = 1, offset = 1) between 'store' operation ('x_0_addr_write_ln28', fft_512/fft.cpp:28) of variable '__r._M_value' on array 'x_0' and 'load' operation ('__t') on array 'x_0'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-880 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-880.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_19_2' (fft_512/fft.cpp:18:9) in function 'fft_fast' the outer loop is not a perfect loop. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-960] Cannot flatten loop 'VITIS_LOOP_22_3' (fft_512/fft.cpp:23:39) in function 'fft_fast' the outer loop is not a perfect loop because either the parent loop or the sub loop has no computeable trip count. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-960 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.1;t=hls+guidance;d=200-960.html

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'fft_512_top_fmul_32ns_32ns_32_4_max_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'fft_512_top_faddfsub_32ns_32ns_32_5_full_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.
